I am writing to formally request a refund for my subscription that was mistakenly charged for an entire year. I intended to select the monthly billing option, and this discrepancy has caused significant confusion on my part, especially given the details outlined in your user manual, which I believe may have contributed to this oversight. Please let me know the next steps to rectify this situation.

Plus, I can’t find the warranty document, which is just adding to my frustration. Can you help me figure out what’s going on with it? This is so not what I signed up for!
